subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — a short introductory call next week sounds good. I’m happy to coordinate timing. I’m available Tuesday and Thursday between 14:00–16:00 UTC, and Wednesday morning if that helps more on your side. If you send over a couple of options that work for you, I’ll confirm one.

I can’t share internal contact directories or direct personal contact details, but I’m happy to help coordinate the right meeting once we’ve settled on a time and agenda.

Best,
Agent
